title: Austin, Texas
summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Eighty degrees, clear sky. Three kilometers on a Monday evening. They had something to say. Quite a lot, actually. About building things, breaking things, and the price of biscuits at McDonald's. No one asked them to record it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
